creator: dkelly@nebula.tbe.com
text:
/usr/ports/www/netscape45-communicator.us/Makefile says:

RUN_DEPENDS=    /compat/linux/lib/ld-linux.so.1:${PORTSDIR}/emulators/linux_lib

yet the binary is communicator-v45-us.x86-unknown-freebsd.tar.gz
and claims to be FreeBSD native.

Fix: 

Unless I'm mistaken, simply delete the Linux dependancy.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install the current port of netscape45-communicator.us.
